original_image_tags: A single, aged, off-white page. The word "RESTRICTED" is stamped in black, uppercase, sans-serif font at the top center and again at the bottom center. The main body of the page is blank, except for very faint, illegible impressions or bleed-through of text from another page, which are not decipherable.

elements.description: A page with the word 'RESTRICTED' printed in black uppercase text at the top center and bottom center. Faint, mostly illegible typed text is visible through the paper from the reverse side, but no distinct visual elements are present on this side.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the absence of real visual content (photographs, sketches, etc.) and consistently describe the same textual elements and faint impressions on the page.
